Game.Name: BattleTech 3050 (Japan)
Game.plot: MechWarrior 3050 is a Simulation game, developed by EA Tiburon and published by Activision,which was released in 1995.Cheat: Cheat CodePress Down, A, X on the Tiburon screen, and enter XTRM3K as a password, to play as the enemy mech.Cheat: InvincibilityIn order to gain invincibility, you must do the following. Choose "Options" from the main screen, then go down to the Password entry screen and enter all of these codes in the following order. Once you have done this, you will be invincible with unlimited ammo.
